LAMIR 2024

Poster Sessions


Session 1: Music Analysis and MIR Tasks

Paper Title Authors Links
Analyzing Pitch Content In Traditional Ghanaian Seperewa Songs Kelvin Walls, Iran R. Roman, Kelsey Van Ert, Colter Harper, Leila Adu-Gilmore Poster
A Corpus Study Of Rhythm In Brazilian Popular Music Hugo T. Carvalho, Felipe D. Martins, Carlos de Lemos Almada Poster
Beat Tracking For Salsa Music: Adapting And Benchmarking Models Using A Newly Introduced Salsa Dataset Antonin P.L. Rapini, Anna Jordanous Poster
Music Source Separation In Historical Brazilian Choro Recordings Pedro Donadio de Tomaz Júnior, Martín Rocamora, Luiz W.P. Biscainho Poster
Shallow Neural Network Architectures For Musical Genre Classification Natanael L. de Matos, Hugo T. Carvalho, Carlos Tadeu Pagani Zanini Poster
Skip That Beat: Augmenting Meter Tracking Models For Underrepresented Time Signatures Giovana V. Morais, Brian McFee, Magdalena Fuentes Poster
Improving Music Emotion Recognition By Leveraging Handcrafted And Learned Features Pedro L. Louro, Hugo Redinho, Ricardo S. Malheiro, Rui P. Paiva, Renato Panda Poster


Session 2: MIR Applications

Paper Title Authors Links
Symbolic Music Style Transfer Via Latent Space Transformations: Model And Evaluation Lucas Somacal, Pablo Riera, Diego Fernandez Slezak, Martin A. Miguel Poster
Surprising Patterns In Musical Influence Networks Flavio Figueiredo, Tales Panoutsos, Nazareno Andrade Poster
I've Heard This Before: Tiktok's Impact On The Re-Popularization Of Songs Breno S. Matos, Francisco Galuppo Azevedo, Rennan Lima, Flavio Figueiredo Poster
Assessing The Impact Of Sampling, Remixes, And Covers On Original Song Popularity Guilherme S. dos Santos, Flavio Figueiredo Poster
Tempo Estimation Using Combined Mel-Spectrogram And Mel-Scalogram Inputs Luiz Alberto Guimarães Viana, Antonio Carlos Lopes Fernandes Jr., Eduardo Simas Poster
Aeromamba: An Efficient Architecture For Audio Super-Resolution Using Generative Adversarial Networks And State Space Models Wallace C. de Abreu, Luiz Biscainho Poster
Long-Form Text-To-Music Generation With Adaptive Prompts: A Case Of Study In Tabletop Role-Playing Games Soundtracks Felipe F. Marra, Lucas N. Ferreira Poster


1st Latin American Music Information Retrieval Workshop

December 9 - 11, 2024

Rio de Janeiro, Brazil

lamir.workshop@gmail.com
